# Arclight Painting

> Veteran-owned professional painting company based in Bothell, WA. 4.9★ rating with 269+ Google reviews. Serving the greater Eastside and North King County.

## About

Arclight Painting is a veteran-owned, locally operated painting company headquartered in Bothell, Washington. Founded by Shawn and Chad, the company specializes in residential and commercial painting across the greater Seattle Eastside and Snohomish County. Arclight is known for its Above & Beyond Blueprint — a structured process that ensures consistent, high-quality results on every project.

- Phone: (425) 757-1199
- Email: info@arclightpainting.com
- Address: 9906 NE 204th Place, Bothell, WA 98011
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 4:30 PM

## Services

- [Interior Painting](https://arclightpainting.com/services/interior-painting): Walls, ceilings, trim, doors, and accent walls for homes and businesses.
- [Exterior Painting](https://arclightpainting.com/services/exterior-painting): Full exterior prep, priming, and painting for siding, trim, fascia, and soffits.
- [Cabinet Refinishing](https://arclightpainting.com/services/cabinet-refinishing): Kitchen and bathroom cabinet painting and refinishing.
- [Drywall Repair](https://arclightpainting.com/services/drywall-repairs): Patching, texturing, and finishing drywall before painting.
- [Popcorn Ceiling Removal](https://arclightpainting.com/services/popcorn-ceiling-removal): Safe removal and retexturing of popcorn ceilings.
- [Pressure Washing](https://arclightpainting.com/services/pressure-washing): Exterior cleaning for siding, decks, driveways, and fences.
- [Commercial Painting](https://arclightpainting.com/services/commercial-painting): Office, retail, restaurant, and multi-unit commercial painting.
- [Painter for a Day](https://arclightpainting.com/services/painter-for-a-day): Hire a professional painter for small jobs and touch-ups.
- [Color Consultation](https://arclightpainting.com/services/color-consultation): Expert color selection guidance for interior and exterior projects.

## Service Areas

Arclight Painting serves the following cities in Washington State:

- [Bothell](https://arclightpainting.com/) (headquarters)
- [Kirkland](https://arclightpainting.com/kirkland)
- [Bellevue](https://arclightpainting.com/bellevue)
- [Redmond](https://arclightpainting.com/redmond)
- [Woodinville](https://arclightpainting.com/woodinville)
- [Kenmore](https://arclightpainting.com/kenmore)
- [Mill Creek](https://arclightpainting.com/mill-creek)
- [Everett](https://arclightpainting.com/everett)
- [Lake Forest Park](https://arclightpainting.com/lake-forest-park)
- [Cottage Lake](https://arclightpainting.com/cottage-lake)
- [Union Hill-Novelty Hill](https://arclightpainting.com/union-hill-novelty-hill)
- [Clearview](https://arclightpainting.com/clearview)
- [Seattle](https://arclightpainting.com/seattle)

## Key Differentiators

- Veteran-owned and locally operated
- 4.9-star rating with 269+ verified Google reviews
- Above & Beyond Blueprint — a documented 5-step process for every project
- TrueQuote system — transparent, detailed estimates with no hidden fees
- Premium paints from Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore
- Fully licensed, bonded, and insured in Washington State
